_comment: KNOWN, consciously-accepted Python<->Go verifier divergences for scripts/differential_fuzz.py. The fuzz CI job fails on ANY divergence not listed here. This list is EMPTY: differential fuzzing across the two runtimes finds zero divergences. Every entry that was once here (the pre-hardening findings H1-H4, M1-M3, M6) was eliminated by a fix, not silenced — see docs/hardening-review.md. Do NOT add a signature here to mute a new divergence; investigate it.
